sentences.target: Mein Auto steht heute in der Werkstatt.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈaʊ̯toː ʃteːt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈvɛʁkʃtat/

translations.de: Mein Auto steht heute in der Werkstatt.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈaʊ̯toː ʃteːt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈvɛʁkʃtat/
translations.en: My car is at the garage today.
translations.es: Mi coche está en el taller hoy.
translations.fr: Ma voiture est au garage aujourd’hui.
translations.it: La mia auto è in officina oggi.
translations.pt: Meu carro está na oficina hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay xe của tôi ở tiệm sửa xe.
translations.nl: Mijn auto staat vandaag in de garage.
translations.hu: Az autóm ma a szervizben van.
translations.hi: आज मेरी कार गैराज में है.
translations.pl: Mój samochód jest dziś w warsztacie.
translations.el: Το αυτοκίνητό μου είναι σήμερα στο συνεργείο.
translations.nb: Bilen min er på verksted i dag.
translations.id: Mobil saya di bengkel hari ini.
translations.sv: Min bil är på verkstaden i dag.
translations.ro: Mașina mea este la service astăzi.
translations.cs: Moje auto je dnes v servisu.
translations.da: Min bil er på værksted i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は車が修理工場にあります。

tokens.explanation: Attributive possessive determiner modifying Auto; agrees as nominative neuter singular; marks possession.
Common noun, neuter nominative singular; head of the subject NP; entity that is located.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; stative location verb selecting a locative prepositional phrase.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; situates the event in time.
Two-way preposition indicating location; with a static meaning here and thus governs dative.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; marks case and definiteness of Werkstatt in the PP.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of the preposition in; denotes the location.

sentences.target: Ich hole das Fahrrad aus der Werkstatt.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhoːlə das ˈfaːʁaːt aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ ˈvɛʁkʃtat/

translations.de: Ich hole das Fahrrad aus der Werkstatt.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhoːlə das ˈfaːʁaːt aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ ˈvɛʁkʃtat/
translations.en: I’m picking up the bike from the workshop.
translations.es: Voy a recoger la bicicleta del taller.
translations.fr: Je vais récupérer le vélo à l’atelier.
translations.it: Vado a ritirare la bici dall’officina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我要去修理店取自行车。
translations.pt: Vou buscar a bicicleta na oficina.
translations.he: אני הולך לאסוף את האופניים מהמוסך.
translations.vi: Tôi đi lấy xe đạp ở tiệm sửa.
translations.nl: Ik haal de fiets op bij de fietsenmaker.
translations.hi: मैं साइकिल मरम्मत की दुकान से लेने जा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Πάω να παραλάβω το ποδήλατο από το συνεργείο.
translations.ro: Merg să iau bicicleta de la service.
translations.ja: 自転車を修理店に取りに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite transitive verb, 1st person singular present; selects an accusative direct object.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; marks the direct object Fahrrad.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object of hole; the item being fetched.
Preposition meaning ‘out of/from’; governs dative and introduces a source PP.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; marks Werkstatt in the PP headed by aus.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of aus; denotes the source location.

sentences.target: Der Laptop kommt morgen aus der Werkstatt zurück.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈlɛptɔp kɔmt ˈmɔʁɡn̩ aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ ˈvɛʁkʃtat tsuˈʁʏk/

translations.de: Der Laptop kommt morgen aus der Werkstatt zurück.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈlɛptɔp kɔmt ˈmɔʁɡn̩ aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ ˈvɛʁkʃtat t͡suˈʁʏk/
translations.en: The laptop comes back from the repair shop tomorrow.
translations.es: El portátil vuelve del servicio técnico mañana.
translations.fr: L’ordinateur portable revient du réparateur demain.
translations.zh-Hans: 笔记本电脑明天从维修店取回。
translations.yue: 手提電腦聽日喺維修店攞返嚟。
translations.pt: O laptop volta da assistência amanhã.
translations.vi: Laptop sẽ được trả về từ tiệm sửa vào ngày mai.
translations.ar: الحاسوب المحمول سيعود من ورشة الإصلاح غدًا.
translations.nl: De laptop komt morgen terug van de reparatie.
translations.hu: A laptop holnap jön vissza a szervizből.
translations.hi: लैपटॉप कल मरम्मत की दुकान से वापस आएगा.
translations.el: Το λάπτοπ επιστρέφει από το σέρβις αύριο.
translations.nb: Laptopen kommer tilbake fra verkstedet i morgen.
translations.id: Laptop kembali dari tempat servis besok.
translations.sv: Laptopen kommer tillbaka från verkstaden i morgon.
translations.ro: Laptopul se întoarce de la service mâine.
translations.cs: Notebook se vrátí ze servisu zítra.
translations.da: Laptoppen kommer tilbage fra værkstedet i morgen.
translations.ja: ノートパソコンは明日修理から戻ってきます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; marks the subject NP.
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite intransitive verb, 3rd person singular present; indicates motion, typically taking a source PP with aus.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time of the event.
Preposition meaning ‘from/out of’; governs dative and introduces a source PP.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; marks Werkstatt in the PP.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of aus; source location.
Adverb indicating return; modifies the verb phrase and completes the motion meaning.

sentences.target: Er arbeitet seit Jahren in einer Werkstatt.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tət zaɪ̯t ˈjaːʁən ɪn ˈaɪ̯nɐ ˈvɛʁkʃtat/

translations.de: Er arbeitet seit Jahren in einer Werkstatt.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tət zaɪ̯t ˈjaːʁən ɪn ˈaɪ̯nɐ ˈvɛʁkʃtat/
translations.en: He has worked in a workshop for years.
translations.es: Lleva años trabajando en un taller.
translations.fr: Il travaille dans un atelier depuis des années.
translations.ko: 그는 여러 해 동안 정비소에서 일하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在修理厂工作很多年了。
translations.ru: Он уже много лет работает в мастерской.
translations.pt: Ele trabalha numa oficina há anos.
translations.vi: Anh ấy làm ở xưởng đã nhiều năm.
translations.ar: هو يعمل في ورشة منذ سنوات.
translations.nl: Hij werkt al jaren in een werkplaats.
translations.uk: Він уже багато років працює в майстерні.
translations.hi: वह कई सालों से एक वर्कशॉप में काम कर रहा है.
translations.pl: On od lat pracuje w warsztacie.
translations.el: Δουλεύει σε συνεργείο εδώ και χρόνια.
translations.nb: Han har jobbet på et verksted i mange år.
translations.id: Dia sudah bertahun-tahun bekerja di bengkel.
translations.sv: Han har jobbat på en verkstad i många år.
translations.ro: Lucrează într-un atelier de ani buni.
translations.da: Han har arbejdet på et værksted i årevis.
translations.fi: Hän on työskennellyt verstaassa vuosien ajan.
translations.ja: 彼は何年も整備工場で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person masculine nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive verb of activity.
Preposition ‘since/for’; governs dative; introduces a temporal PP expressing duration.
Common noun, dative plural; object of seit; expresses the duration (‘for years’).
Two-way preposition; with static location thus governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Indefinite article, feminine dative singular; marks indefiniteness and case of Werkstatt in the PP.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of in; denotes the workplace location.
